` }, toRecipients: [{ emailAddress: { address: 'it-admin@company.fi' } }] }, saveToSentItems: false }) }}

No action required. Tenant security posture is above the 80% threshold.

parameters.content:
## M365 Smart Inbox + Security Monitor

### Email-to-Task Parser + Security Score Monitor

### How it works
Two independent automation pipelines on a single Microsoft Graph OAuth2 credential:

**Pipeline 1 — Email-to-Task Parser (every 30 min)**
1. Scans Outlook for unread emails every 30 minutes
2. Parses each email for configurable action keywords (URGENT, ACTION REQUIRED, TASK:, etc.)
3. Extracts due dates from ISO format, structured `due:` prefixes, or relative phrases (today, tomorrow, end of week)
4. Creates a Microsoft Planner task with correct priority, due date, and sender notes
5. Posts a Teams notification, sends an auto-reply, and marks the email as read
6. Poison Pill Guard + Had Error? node checks for silent node failures before looping

**Pipeline 2 — Security Score Monitor (every Monday 08:00)**
1. Fetches the latest Microsoft Secure Score from the Graph API
2. Calculates the score as a percentage
3. If below 80%: checks for an existing open alert task to avoid duplicates, then creates or updates a priority-1 Planner task with a 24-hour due date, and posts a Teams alert
4. If healthy: posts a green summary to the Teams channel

### Setup steps
- [ ] Connect Microsoft Graph OAuth2 credential (covers Outlook, Planner, Teams)
- [ ] Set `PLANNER_PLAN_ID` workflow variable
- [ ] Set `PLANNER_BUCKET_ID` workflow variable
- [ ] Set `TASK_ASSIGNEE_USER_ID` workflow variable
- [ ] Set `TEAMS_TEAM_ID` workflow variable
- [ ] Set `TEAMS_CHANNEL_ID` workflow variable
- [ ] Set `MONITORED_MAILBOX` workflow variable (UPN of the mailbox to scan)
- [ ] Set `ACTION_KEYWORDS` workflow variable (comma-separated, defaults to: ACTION REQUIRED,URGENT,TASK:,PLEASE REVIEW,CRITICAL)
- [ ] Set `REPORT_TIMEZONE` workflow variable (defaults to: Europe/Helsinki)
- [ ] Update error email recipient in Send Error Notification Email node

### Required credentials
Microsoft Graph OAuth2 (covers all M365 nodes)

### Required Graph API permissions
`Mail.ReadWrite` `Tasks.ReadWrite` `ChannelMessage.Send` `SecurityEvents.Read.All`

## Email Ingestion
Polls Outlook every 30 minutes for unread emails. Exits cleanly if inbox is empty. Splits emails into a sequential batch loop for one-at-a-time processing.

## Keyword Extraction & Date Parsing
Strips HTML from email body, then scans subject and body for configurable action keywords. Extracts due dates from ISO format, structured `due:`/`by:` prefixes, or relative phrases (today, tomorrow, end of week, Friday). Emails with no keyword match are marked read and skipped. Timezone is read from the `REPORT_TIMEZONE` workflow variable with a `process.env` fallback.

## Task Creation Chain
Creates a Planner task via Graph API with title, priority, due date, and assignee. Sets the task description with sender details and a 500-char body preview. Posts an HTML Teams notification with subject, sender, keyword, priority, and due date. Sends an HTML auto-reply to the sender. Marks the email as read and tags it with the `Task Created` category via a dedicated update node — this is the fix that prevents the infinite re-processing loop. All nodes run with Continue on Fail so a single API error does not crash the batch.

## Poison Pill Guard & Rate Limit
Checks upstream nodes for silent failures after each email is processed. The `Had Error?` IF node routes confirmed failures to a dead-end branch (wire to an admin alert node as needed) and clean executions to the rate limit wait. Waits 2 seconds between emails to respect Graph API limits, then loops back to the batch splitter for the next email.

## Score Fetch & Calculation
Runs every Monday at 08:00. Fetches the latest Secure Score from the Microsoft Graph Security API and calculates it as a percentage of the maximum achievable score. Threshold is 80% — below triggers the alert path, at or above posts a healthy summary to Teams. Timezone is read from the `REPORT_TIMEZONE` workflow variable with a `process.env` fallback.

## Alert Routing & Deduplication
Checks whether an open Security Score Alert task already exists in the Planner bucket. If one is open, resolves its task ID and updates the description with the latest score. If no open task exists, creates a new one. Prevents duplicate tasks accumulating across weekly runs.

## Security Task & Teams Alert
Creates or updates a priority-1 Planner task with a 24-hour due date and a description linking to the Defender portal. Posts an HTML Teams alert with the current score, maximum score, and scan date. If the score is healthy, posts a green summary instead.

## Global Error Failsafe
Independent trigger that catches any catastrophic workflow failure and sends a structured HTML error email via the Graph API with the execution ID, failed node name, error message, and timestamp.
